title: Magdalene #3094
definition:
Magdalene = "a tower"

 1) a name given to Mary Magdalene, identifying her as from Magdala
nasbUsage:
Definition: Magdalene = "a tower"

 1) a name given to Mary Magdalene, identifying her as from Magdala

    NASB:  Magdalene, of Magdala, a place on the coast of the Sea of Galilee near Tiberias:
